schemaChecks.evidence: All 22 required fields present: slug, title, category, parentTopic, layer, guideType, summary, quickAnswer, whenToUse, preferredAction, backupAction, stepByStepActions, warnings, whatNotToDo, redFlags, preparednessTips, sourceQuality, contentStatus, integrationDecision, upgradesGuide, appTags, sourceReferences. Additional fields present: responseRole, constraintTags, blockedByConstraints, alternativeToGuideSlugs, images.
layer='reference' paired with guideType='reference_guide' — valid combination.
category='water_food' is one of the 10 canonical categories.
sourceQuality='mixed' is a valid enum value.
All array fields (whenToUse, stepByStepActions, warnings, whatNotToDo, redFlags, preparednessTips, appTags) are flat arrays of strings with no nested objects.
All 10 sourceReferences entries have all four required fields: title, organization, url, whyUseful.
constraintTags=[] and blockedByConstraints=[] — both empty arrays, no invalid tags.
responseRole='reference' is a valid role value.
alternativeToGuideSlugs=['edible-plant-foraging-basics'] — slug exists in the guide library (confirmed via Supabase query).
constraintTags=[] and blockedByConstraints=[] — no overlap possible.
All field names use camelCase. No snake_case field names detected.
slug='foraging' is lowercase kebab-case with no spaces or uppercase characters.

safetyChecks.evidence: All warnings, whatNotToDo, and redFlags cross-checked against research-packet.json findings. All claims trace to at least one research finding: UET protocol and limitations (FM 21-76), Apiaceae family danger (Illinois Extension, UMD Extension, OSU Extension), mushroom exclusion (FM 21-76), seasonal toxicity (Cleveland Clinic), contamination risk (USDA), identification app limitations (Cleveland Clinic), Poison Control contact (HRSA), symptom-based red flags (Poison Control, Cleveland Clinic, Merck Manual).
No medical or safety claims found that are not grounded in the research packet or widely established emergency guidance.
stepByStepActions=[] — correctly empty for a reference_guide.

Evidence tier is authoritative_plus_field_practice. sourceQuality='mixed' is appropriate: majority of sources are authoritative (USDA, university extensions, Poison Control, Merck Manual) but field-practice sources (FM 21-76, Sam Thayer) also contribute. The mix is honestly reflected.

Upgrading from existing guide which had 2 warnings: (1) 'Misidentification of wild plants is a common and potentially fatal error' — preserved and expanded in warnings[0]; (2) 'Do not eat any plant unless positively identified by an expert source' — preserved in whatNotToDo[0] and quickAnswer. Both original redFlags also preserved: burning sensation/nausea/vomiting covered in redFlags[0-1], loss of consciousness/difficulty breathing covered in redFlags[3-5].

duplicateChecks.evidence: integrationDecision='upgrade', upgradesGuide='foraging' — the target slug 'foraging' exists in the guide library (Supabase ID: 822eca4a-a487-4967-a424-8a0bc4201dfe).

The upgraded guide changes parentTopic from 'Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment' to 'Emergency Food Procurement'. This is an intentional correction — the original guide was misplaced under a water treatment topic. The category remains water_food, which is correct.

Existing edible-plant-foraging-basics (scenario_guide) covers step-by-step foraging procedures with 10 steps. This reference_guide focuses on identification principles, the UET as a reference protocol, dangerous plant family recognition, and poisonous lookalike profiles. stepByStepActions is correctly empty. Content overlap is minimal and complementary.

constraintChecks.evidence: responseRole='reference' in the 'Emergency Food Procurement' parentTopic, reference layer. No other guide in this parentTopic has a reference-layer role. No conflict.
alternativeToGuideSlugs=['edible-plant-foraging-basics'] — this slug is in the same parentTopic ('Emergency Food Procurement'). Valid relationship.

blockedByConstraints=[] — this is a reference guide providing educational identification knowledge. It is not blocked by any physical constraint (it provides knowledge, not a physical procedure). Empty blockedByConstraints is logically correct.

warnings: parentTopic changed from 'Water Collection and Basic Treatment Without Equipment' to 'Emergency Food Procurement' — this is an intentional correction of a misplacement, but the admin should verify the parent_topic_id is updated during import.
The title changed from 'Foraging' to 'Wild Plant Identification for Emergency Foraging' — more descriptive but a notable change that human reviewers should confirm.

sourceQuality is 'mixed' rather than 'strong' because the Universal Edibility Test (a core topic) is sourced from a military field manual (field-practice tier) rather than peer-reviewed clinical guidance. This is honest and appropriate for the evidence tier.
recommendation: Pass. All schema checks pass. All safety checks pass. No blocking issues. Three advisory warnings exist, all related to intentional changes (parentTopic correction, title improvement, honest source quality assessment) that should be reviewed by a human but do not block import. The guide is well-differentiated from the existing edible-plant-foraging-basics scenario_guide and provides complementary reference content. Proceed to Import/Staging.
